title: Taxonomy intelligence — category & subcat suggestion
description: When a supplier writes a product description, AI reads it and: (1) suggests the category if not set, (2) suggests matching subcats from that category's controlled list, (3) flags if description doesn't match assigned category. Prompt pattern: given description + available categories + scoped subcat list → return suggested_category, confidence, suggested_subcats, flag. Works for both supplier catalogue uploads and producer brief parsing.
